_about: RFC 0002 P0 — frozen FTS-only retrieval baseline. Produced read-only by runtime.service.learnings.eval.run(). Every later phase re-runs eval and must improve these numbers, never regress. The self_probe.dark_count and the surfacing audit's newly_dark gate stay empty across phases.

paraphrase_post_p1._note: Captured 2026-06-10 AFTER P1 (frontmatter + structured coverage), against the frozen authored fixture tests/fixtures/paraphrase_probes.json (22 probes). This is the semantic-headroom yardstick for P2/P3: queries share meaning but not words with their gold. The 7 misses @5 are pure meaning!=words cases (incl. one cross-lingual English-query/Korean-body probe) — the class only semantic retrieval can recover.

surfacing_audit_k5._note: Audit total (135) is one more than eval self_probe.probes (134): one accepted learning has no concept tag and no usable title, so it has an empty self-probe. eval excludes empty-probe rows from its denominator; the audit counts it (dark by construction).
